title: CorpFlowAI engagement process timeline
description: Hand-crafted SVG diagram of the five-stage CorpFlowAI engagement process: intake review, pilot scope, 48-hour setup, seven-day pilot monitoring, and pilot review meeting. Used at the top of the public Process page (https://corpflowai.com/process). Restrained brushed-brass and pale-cyan markers on a transparent background so it sits cleanly on the dark navy page canvas.

licence.terms: Original CorpFlowAI mark. Free to reuse across CorpFlowAI surfaces; do not redistribute as stock.

accessibility.alt: Five-stage CorpFlowAI engagement timeline: intake review (1 business day), pilot scope, 48-hour setup, 7-day operator-watched pilot monitoring, and pilot review meeting where the owner and operator decide together to continue or close.

usage.primary_cta: See how a CorpFlowAI engagement runs
usage.notes: slot:trust_process_timeline. Used on the institutional /process page; safe to reuse on /onboarding and shared surfaces. Keep on a dark canvas (#06111f - #101827).
